name: RevPAR Identity
description: RevPAR must equal Occupancy multiplied by ADR within 0.5 percent rounding tolerance

name: Revenue Components Sum
description: Total revenue must equal sum of Rooms plus Food and Beverage plus Other Operated Departments revenue

name: Departmental Expense Sum
description: Reported total departmental expense must equal sum of departmental expense line items

name: GOP Identity
description: GOP must equal Total Revenue minus Departmental Expenses minus Undistributed Operating Expenses

name: NOI Identity
description: NOI must equal GOP minus Management Fee minus FF&E Reserve minus Fixed Charges

name: GOP Margin Range
description: Gross Operating Profit margin should fall between 15 and 55 percent of Total Revenue

name: NOI Margin Range
description: Net Operating Income margin should fall between 10 and 45 percent of Total Revenue

name: FF&E Reserve Range
description: FF&E Reserve should be 3 to 5 percent of Total Revenue per industry standard

name: Brand FF&E Reserve Floor
description: Most franchise agreements require minimum 4 percent FF&E reserve

name: Management Fee Range
description: Base management fee typically 2 to 6 percent of Total Revenue

name: Incentive Management Fee Range
description: Incentive management fee typically capped at 20 percent of GOP above hurdle

name: Occupancy Range
description: Annual occupancy should fall between 40 and 95 percent for stabilized assets

name: ADR Range
description: ADR should fall between 50 and 2000 USD for credible US hotel deal

name: RevPAR Growth Range
description: Year over year RevPAR growth outside plus or minus 20 percent merits explanation

name: Rooms Department Margin Select-Service
description: Select-service Rooms departmental profit margin should be 60 to 80 percent of Rooms Revenue

name: Rooms Department Margin Full-Service
description: Full-service Rooms departmental profit margin should be 70 to 85 percent of Rooms Revenue

name: F&B Department Margin Full-Service
description: Full-service Food and Beverage departmental profit margin should be 10 to 25 percent of F&B Revenue

name: F&B Not Applicable Select-Service
description: Select-service hotels typically have negligible F&B revenue (under 5 percent)

name: Labor Percent of Revenue Select-Service
description: Total labor cost should be 28 to 42 percent of Total Revenue for select-service

name: Labor Percent of Revenue Full-Service
description: Total labor cost should be 30 to 45 percent of Total Revenue for full-service

name: Labor Per Occupied Room
description: Labor cost per occupied room should fall between 15 and 90 USD

name: Insurance Per Key
description: Property insurance per key should fall between 500 and 2500 USD outside of coastal markets

name: Insurance Per Key Coastal Flag
description: Coastal market property insurance commonly exceeds 2500 USD per key after wind and flood loadings

name: Property Tax Per Key
description: Property tax should be 1 to 4 percent of assessed property value

name: Utilities Per Key
description: Annual utilities expense per key should fall between 800 and 2500 USD

name: Marketing Percent of Revenue
description: Sales and Marketing expense typically 3 to 8 percent of Total Revenue

name: Repairs and Maintenance Percent
description: Repairs and Maintenance typically 3 to 7 percent of Total Revenue

name: Administrative and General Percent
description: Administrative and General expense typically 6 to 11 percent of Total Revenue

name: Franchise Royalty Fee Range
description: Franchise royalty fee typically 4 to 7 percent of Rooms Revenue

name: Franchise Marketing Fee Range
description: Franchise marketing or program fee typically 2 to 5 percent of Rooms Revenue

name: PIP Per Key
description: Property Improvement Plan budget per key varies by brand cycle and tier

name: Renovation Hard Cost Per Key
description: Renovation hard costs per key vary by scope and tier

name: ADR vs Comp Set Index
description: Subject ADR should fall within 80 to 130 percent of comp set ADR (ARI)

name: RevPAR vs Comp Set Index
description: Subject RevPAR Generation Index (RGI) should fall between 0.85 and 1.30

name: Occupancy vs Comp Set Index
description: Subject Market Penetration Index (MPI) should fall between 0.85 and 1.20

name: Minimum Debt Yield
description: Acquisition debt yield should exceed 8 percent for credible underwriting

name: Minimum DSCR
description: Debt Service Coverage Ratio must exceed 1.20x at acquisition

name: Maximum Loan to Value
description: Acquisition LTV should not exceed 75 percent for hotel collateral

name: Maximum Loan to Cost
description: Loan to total capitalization should not exceed 70 percent

name: Interest Rate Sanity Check
description: Hotel mortgage interest rate should fall between 4 and 12 percent

name: Cap Rate Range
description: Entry cap rate should fall between 4 and 9 percent depending on market and tier

name: Exit Cap Spread to Entry
description: Exit cap rate typically 0 to 150 bps wider than entry cap (exit cushion)

name: Price Per Key Range
description: Price per key sanity check across all tiers

name: Levered IRR Core Strategy
description: Core strategy targets 8 to 12 percent levered IRR

name: Levered IRR Value-Add Strategy
description: Value-add strategy targets 12 to 18 percent levered IRR

name: Levered IRR Opportunistic Strategy
description: Opportunistic strategy targets 18 percent or higher levered IRR

name: Equity Multiple Minimum
description: Equity multiple should exceed 1.5x over the hold period

name: Yield on Cost Minimum
description: Stabilized yield on total capital should exceed 7 percent

name: Broker vs T-12 NOI Variance
description: Broker proforma NOI variance from T-12 actual exceeding 5 percent must be reconciled

name: Broker vs T-12 Occupancy Variance
description: Broker proforma occupancy variance from T-12 actual exceeding 200 bps must be reconciled

name: Broker vs T-12 ADR Variance
description: Broker proforma ADR variance from T-12 actual exceeding 5 percent must be reconciled

name: T-12 vs T-24 Trend Sanity
description: T-12 RevPAR change versus T-24 outside plus or minus 15 percent merits review

name: Monthly Seasonality Sanity
description: Peak to trough monthly RevPAR ratio above 4x indicates extreme seasonality

name: Parking Revenue Percent
description: Parking revenue typically 0 to 5 percent of Total Revenue

name: Spa Revenue Percent
description: Spa revenue typically 0 to 4 percent of Total Revenue for resort assets

name: Meeting Space Revenue Percent
description: Meeting and banquet revenue typically under 8 percent for non-group focused properties
